goal: Keep client-department copy, image prompt, and video script production source-backed, material-gated, and usable by employees in Feishu.

acceptance_criteria.description: Client-department content requests match a dedicated content package scenario instead of a generic marketing workflow.
Missing client, occasion, brand/product, or goal inputs pause generation and produce material-intake next actions.
Client content SOP payload carries required outputs for copy, image prompt, video script, source citations, risk notes, and employee review.
Client follow-up, event invitation, and private-domain campaign requests match dedicated P0 scenarios instead of a generic marketing workflow.
Client follow-up requests with missing segment, last interaction, or goal are blocked before generation and keep the no-default-email channel policy.
Private-domain campaign payloads require segmentation, message variants, posting sequence, and review checklist when materials are ready.
